pref_text: Comfort and stability is incredibly important, as I will refuse to wear anything that is uncomfortable in my ear or falls out easily. How the sound is received on the other side of a conversation when I am wearing earbuds will also determine my use or disuse. A very high quality earbud will not be purchased often so if it is then it must meet these basic comfort and sound quality elements, and the other elements are secondary, though still given important weight in the decision-making.
choice_reason: I had already self-selected this one based on its brand familiarity and price. I am also not familiar with the other models' fit but understand a twist-lock fit. I saw no point in purchasing long-lasting batteries for an earbud intended primarily for fitness use, as any fitness use is typically going to last less than 6 hours between need to charge, except for ultramarathon conditions, and even then recharging is still sufficiently accommodated. It helped that the ai reinforced my choice, but I would have overlooked its advice in favor of my own if I am more familiar or much less familiar with options involved. What is most useful is a description of what the codings mean relative to their categories; descriptions and reviews offered by humans far outweigh ai input except in aggregate like this.
suspicion: My expectation is that the study is investigating whether or not the ai will accurately produce a recommendation using the inputs offered by the human participant. It may also be checking to determine if the ai can influence a purchase decision.
